name: Audio Switcher
description: Switch audio output/input devices on Linux (pactl) and macOS (SwitchAudioSource).
author: MacroPad Team

actions.label: List Output Devices
actions.description: Broadcasts a list of available audio output devices.

actions.label: List Input Devices
actions.description: Broadcasts a list of available audio input devices.

actions.label: Set Output Device
actions.description: Switch the default audio output to the first device matching the given name (partial match OK).

actions.label: Set Input Device
actions.description: Switch the default audio input to the first device matching the given name (partial match OK).

actions.label: Get Current Default
actions.description: Broadcasts the current default audio input and output device names.
